zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏强，上行试探压力
zh.content:
AVAX/USD最新报6.7992，24小时上涨3.15%，价格运行于20日均线6.7199上方，显示短线多头略占优势。日内波动区间介于6.5865至6.9455之间，市场情绪有所改善，但整体仍处于震荡格局。

从技术指标看，MACD值为-0.0245，虽然仍处于零轴下方，但负值幅度有限，表明空头动能正在减弱。RSI数据暂缺，不过结合价格站稳均线来看，短期买盘力量有所回升，需关注后续动能延续情况。

关键支撑位位于6.72附近的20日均线区域，其次为日内低点6.59。若价格跌破上述区域，可能重新测试6.50关口。上方首要阻力位在6.95附近，突破后有望进一步挑战7.10至7.20区间，形成新的反弹空间。

交易策略方面，激进交易者可关注回踩6.72附近后的企稳机会，顺势布局短多；稳健投资者则可等待有效突破6.95后再考虑跟进。若价格失守6.59支撑，应严格控制仓位并设置止损，以防震荡转弱。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is showing a modest short-term recovery, with price trading at 6.7992 after gaining 3.15% over the last 24 hours. The market has pushed above the 20-period simple moving average at 6.7199, suggesting improving momentum and a potential shift from recent bearish pressure toward a more neutral-to-bullish structure. The session range between 6.5865 and 6.9455 highlights active participation, although buyers have not yet secured a decisive breakout above recent highs.

The moving average configuration currently favors the bulls, as price remains above the SMA(20), which may now act as dynamic support. However, MACD remains negative at -0.0245, indicating that broader momentum has not fully transitioned into bullish territory. While the negative MACD value suggests lingering downside pressure from the previous trend, the recent price advance could signal weakening bearish momentum. Confirmation would require continued strength and a move into positive MACD territory over coming sessions.

Key support is located near 6.72, aligning closely with the SMA(20), followed by stronger support around 6.59, which marks the recent session low. On the upside, immediate resistance appears near 6.95, the recent high. A successful break above this level could open the path toward the psychological 7.20–7.40 region, where profit-taking activity may emerge. Failure to overcome 6.95 could result in consolidation between support and resistance levels.

From a trading perspective, momentum-oriented traders may consider bullish opportunities on sustained closes above 6.95, targeting higher resistance zones while managing risk below 6.72. More conservative participants may prefer waiting for confirmation that momentum indicators strengthen further before entering. If price falls back below the moving average, short-term bullish expectations would weaken, increasing the probability of a retest of the 6.59 support area. Risk management remains essential given cryptocurrency market volatility.
